title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Charak Pharma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Charak Pharma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Charak Pharma has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Charak Pharma:
Charak Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
